arts.ttl: LIVE: Wrexham face Birmingham City in a Hollywood clash
arts.sum: David Beckham and Tom Brady watch on as Wrexham go 1-0 up against Birmingham City.

arts.ttl: Birmingham CEO wants Wrexham game in USA
arts.sum: Birmingham City's chief executive Garry Cook has said he would like to see his club play Wrexham in an official league game in the United States.

arts.ttl: Birmingham vs Wrexham has star-studded guest list as David Beckham joins Hollywood and NFL icons
arts.sum: Wrexham co-owner Rob McElhenney is set to be in attendance at St Andrew's for the Red Dragons' League One clash against Birmingham City, along with a host of other big names

arts.ttl: Tom Brady, David Beckham and how Birmingham City v Wrexham could spark next big move
arts.sum: Driving the plans behind the scenes for positive change at the respective has included a sprinkling of stardust, with Birmingham owner Tom Wagner and his Knighthead Capital team bringing on board one of American sport’s most famous faces in former NFL star Tom Brady. Since retiring, the 49-year-old ex-Real Madrid and Manchester United star has become an active investor with a diversified portfolio, with one of his main deals being that of acquiring an ownership stake in MLS side Inter Miami, playing a significant role in bringing Lionel Messi to America.

arts.ttl: Birmingham City’s ridiculous 2023 decision will sting even more amid Blackburn Rovers success: Opinion
arts.sum: Birmingham City made one of the most bizarre decisions in recent years when sacking John Eustace, and Blackburn… The post Birmingham City’s ridiculous 2023 decision will sting even more amid Blackburn Rovers success: Opinion appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Wrexham owner dashes to UK to watch Birmingham City match with special A-list guest
arts.sum: There are likely to be plenty of stars present at St Andrews on Monday evening.

arts.ttl: Birmingham vs Wrexham: how do Tom Brady’s and Ryan Reynolds’ fortunes compare?
arts.sum: Two A-list North American owners will go head to head in English club soccer for the first time when Birmingham City host Wrexham in EFL League One on Monday night. Birmingham City, whose ownership group includes NFL legend Tom Brady, were relegated to League One, the third tier of England’s men’s game, at the end of last season.

arts.ttl: David Beckham set to add to Tom Brady stardust at Birmingham City
arts.sum: Rob McElhenney, the Hollywood actor who part owns Wrexham, has astonishingly suggested that David Beckham will be in attendance when the Dragons visit Birmingham City on Monday evening. He won't be alone; Wrexham part owner McElhenney, who bought the Welsh club with Deadpool actor Ryan Reynolds and has since inspired two successive promotions to the third tier, won't be joined by his counterpart but he has remarkably hinted that former England captain and Inter Miami founder Beckham will be visiting, too.

arts.ttl: Birmingham City announce huge partnership with $59b company to kickstart 'defining era'
arts.sum: Blues, since Knighthead arrived over a year ago, have consistently struck eye-catching deals with the likes of Undefeated, who sponsor the club's shirts, while also unveiling highly exciting plans to invest billions in a brand new Sports Quarter, which will become the club's new home by the end of the decade. "Our charitable Foundation is now helping hundreds of thousands of people across the city start to enjoy better lives; leading global brands are excited to partner with us due to the value we can bring; and our owners are spearheading one of the country’s largest infrastructure projects, the Sports Quarter, here in East Birmingham.

arts.ttl: Michael Owen pained by Wrexham’s success but praises Ryan Reynolds and Rob McElhenney
arts.sum: Wrexham currently lead the way in League One and have been propelled to stardom since being purchased by Ryan Reynolds and Rob McElhenney in 2021
